scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --reload-dir ../../packages --reload-dir ../../configs --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.eval:assistant:local: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --local --case local
scripts.eval:assistant:live:core: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case core --max-cost 1.50
scripts.eval:assistant:live:diagrams: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case diagram-routing --max-cost 1.00
scripts.eval:assistant:live:repair: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case repair --max-cost 0.75
scripts.eval:assistant:live:attachments: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case attachments --max-cost 0.50
scripts.eval:assistant:live:confidence: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case confidence --max-cost 0.75
scripts.eval:assistant:live:real-exams: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case real-exams --max-cost 2.50
scripts.eval:assistant:live:real-exams:core: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case real-exams-core --max-cost 0.90
scripts.eval:assistant:live:real-exams:methods-s: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case real-exams-methods-stats --max-cost 0.70
scripts.eval:assistant:live:real-exams:extended: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case real-exams-extended --max-cost 1.70
scripts.eval:assistant:live:real-exams:graph3d: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case real-exams-graph3d --max-cost 0.80
scripts.eval:assistant:live:all: cd apps/api && uv run python ../../scripts/assistant-live-eval.py --case all
scripts.test: pnpm test:api && pnpm test:web-actions && pnpm test:plotly && pnpm build:web
scripts.format:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format app tests ../../packages/question-engine ../../packages/formatting-engine ../../packages/marking-engine
scripts.format:check:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format --check app tests ../../packages/question-engine ../../packages/formatting-engine ../../packages/marking-engine
scripts.lint:web: pnpm exec eslint apps/web packages/shared packages/diagram-plotly packages/diagram-penrose
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check app tests ../../packages/question-engine ../../packages/formatting-engine ../../packages/marking-engine
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm test
